text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To every Umamusume, the winning<n>concert is a
stage of dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To stand center stage is the mark of a<n>victor, and
to sing into a microphone<n>is an honor that precious
few earn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So when they sing, each and every<n>word carries
with it the joy of this<n>triumph...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And the gratitude they feel toward<n>the fans who
pushed them up into the<n>spotlight.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Y-you did great out there. Though it's<n>a shame
that you, um...

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
Heh, absolutely dazzling, wasn't I?<n>...As a backup
dancer, like always.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
...I don't know how you do it. How<n>are you able to
go full out with a smile<n>like that?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
No one would notice if a backup<n>dancer didn't give
100%. Why not<n>save it for when you can be
center?

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
The people cheering for me... they'll<n>cheer for me
no matter where on<n>stage I'm standing.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
Just like you did today. I owe it to<n>them to always
give it my all, no<n>matter what.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
Besides... Hello, do you know why<n>they started
doing winning concerts in<n>the first place?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Because runners wanted a chance to<n>express
their gratitude to fans after a<n>win, right?

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
That's right. We get up on stage and<n>sing to thank
our fans for coming to<n>see us on our big day, for
supporting<n>us.

text_block_list.name: Hello's Upperclassman
text_block_list.text:
But actually, the true origin story's a<n>little different.
Apparently...

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(Her smile back then was truly<n>dazzling, as if there
could be nothing<n>behind it besides pure joy.)

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
(But behind that pure emotion, I<n>couldn't help but
notice a tinge of<n>sadness hiding in the corners.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As debut races inch closer, the<n>students are
starting to put effort into<n>concert practice in
addition to their<n>usual training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the<n>stage...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you can put a little more spirit<n>into it than
that!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh, but we're just rehearsing.<n>We don't need
to be all serious about<n>it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Remember what the teacher said?<n>Rehearse like
it's the real thing. So I<n>want to see big smiles!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...I'm good. If we're pretending it's<n>the real thing,
then I definitely<n>shouldn't be smiling.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: I mean, this choreo is for backup<n>dancers.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah... That's true, but...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I dunno about you, but I don't want to<n>get too
used to this dance. If I can get<n>through it with a
smile, it means I'll<n>never reach center stage.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Don't get me wrong—if I end up as<n>backup, I'll
dance. I'm not gonna ruin<n>the star's show.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: B-but still...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I don't like that attitude! Concerts<n>aren't just
about being center, are<n>they?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Think about all the fans who'll be<n>there to see
you—why don't we<n>rehearse one more time, for
their<n>sakes?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...You don't get it. Of course youcan talk big!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The student kicks up dirt and lunges<n>at Smart
Falcon—time to step in!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to pull them apart and<n>diffuse the
tension.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: S-sorry you had to get involved in<n>this...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It was totally my fault. I needto apologize to her too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Part of me knew that maybe I was<n>being a little
too pushy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, thanks for trying to make mefeel better, but nothing she saidwas wrong either.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it'd be better if we didn't split<n>people up
into center stage or backup<n>dancers or anything...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
No, that wouldn't be right. It's the<n>serious
competition before a winning<n>concert that makes it
so special!<n>That's why everyone dreams of
standing center stage!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Yeah, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Here's one! How about we bring<n>back the Grand
Concert?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Hello Trainer, and Smart Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
You're totally right to feel conflicted.<n>Which is why
I'm here with a solution<n>to your problem!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wh-wha? ...Who are you?

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text: Oh, silly me. I'm Light Hello.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
Event producer and leader of the<n>Grand Concert
Reboot Project!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I met Light Hello, the<n>mysterious
event producer.
